name: Research synthesis workflow
description: Produces a structured synthesis and evidence memo.
artefacts: Research question, corpus notes, quality criteria.
scopeAndConstraints: Rapid review style, transparent assumptions, citation-ready outputs.

steps.title: Extract evidence units
steps.notes: Extract claims, methods, limits, and findings.

steps.title: Build evidence matrix
steps.notes: Organize evidence by themes and confidence.

steps.title: Draft synthesis memo
steps.notes: Summarize implications, uncertainties, and next actions.
